query: UPDATE role_permissions SET detailedPermissions = REPLACE(REPLACE(detailedPermissions, '"listing_create"', '"listing_generate"'), '"listing_optimize"', '"listing_score"') WHERE detailedPermissions LIKE '%listing_create%' OR detailedPermissions LIKE '%listing_optimize%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Vy724JxA6DGk2d.root --database a79tkwusxJ5HWpLxCXSSXN --execute UPDATE role_permissions SET detailedPermissions = REPLACE(REPLACE(detailedPermissions, '"listing_create"', '"listing_generate"'), '"listing_optimize"', '"listing_score"') WHERE detailedPermissions LIKE '%listing_create%' OR detailedPermissions LIKE '%listing_optimize%';
